svg.title: inferex final system architecture blueprint
svg.desc: Complete inferex architecture showing AGENTS.md, dual client layer, FastAPI gateway, schema normaliser, vLLM and SGLang engines, RTX 5090 hardware, observability stack, and Kubernetes plus AWS phases
